jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #12
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 171600
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 012//
RMKS/

   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
